response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, open-source contributions, and exposure to agentic workflows at re:cinq, but lacks demonstrable production-scale multi-agent AI systems in fintech, regulatory compliance experience, and leadership scaling teams beyond 10–15 people — critical gaps for a CTO role requiring deep fintech-AI infrastructure ownership.
strengths: Hands-on experience with agentic workflows and MCP frameworks at re:cinq
Proven track record in distributed systems, event-driven architectures, and real-time data handling
Strong engineering culture advocacy through workshops, TDD, and open-source tooling
concerns: No clear evidence of building or operating multi-agent AI systems in regulated fintech environments
Lacks documented experience scaling engineering teams beyond 10–15 members or leading senior technical leadership layers
Minimal exposure to financial infrastructure domains like credit risk, working capital, or cross-jurisdictional compliance
